_comment: soft_lower / soft_upper: the motion planner will ABORT if any q_des crosses these.
warn_lower / warn_upper: a WARNING is printed when q_des enters the zone between
warn and soft limits (proximity alert before the abort threshold).
These are intentionally conservative (inset ~0.05 rad from the URDF hard limits).

joints.name: pelvis_link_l_yaw_joint
joints._note: joint 1  soft -0.4→0.5 rad  warn 0.05 rad inset

joints.name: pelvis_link_r_yaw_joint
joints._note: joint 2  soft -0.2→0.4 rad  warn 0.05 rad inset

joints._note: joint 3  soft ±0.5 rad  warn 0.05 rad inset

joints.name: r_hip_yaw_link_r_pitch_joint
joints._note: joint 4  soft -0.4→0.5 rad  warn 0.05 rad inset

joints.name: r_hip_pitch_link_r_roll_joint
joints._note: joint 6  soft -0.1→0.4 rad  warn 0.05 rad inset
